task:
Make three precise edits to fix plugin-dev validation warnings. Use only the Edit tool.

1. File: agents/code-simplifier.md
   Add "color: blue" on a new line after "model: opus" in the YAML frontmatter.
   Current frontmatter ends with:
     model: opus
     ---
   Should become:
     model: opus
     color: blue
     ---

2. File: commands/retro.md
   Remove AskUserQuestion from allowed-tools.
   Change: allowed-tools: [AskUserQuestion, Read, Edit, Write]
   To:     allowed-tools: [Read, Edit, Write]

3. File: commands/vamp.md
   Add allowed-tools to the frontmatter. Current frontmatter:
     ---
     description: Survey the project and choose what to play next
     ---
   Should become:
     ---
     description: Survey the project and choose what to play next
     allowed-tools: [Read, Glob]
     ---
